name: hospitality
short_effect: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.
effect_text: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP.
flavor_text: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP
